test_cases.name: test_lock_tokens_positive
steps: Deploy MyTokens contract and mint tokens to user
Approve Vault contract to transfer tokens from user
Call lockTokens function with valid amount and lockDuration
Verify TokensLocked event is emitted
Verify user's lock info in Vault

test_cases.name: test_lock_tokens_negative_insufficient_balance
test_cases.description: User tries to lock more tokens than they have
steps: Deploy MyTokens contract and mint tokens to user
Approve Vault contract to transfer tokens from user
Call lockTokens function with amount greater than user's balance
Verify transaction reverts with 'Token transfer failed'

test_cases.name: test_lock_tokens_negative_zero_amount
test_cases.description: User tries to lock zero tokens
steps: Deploy MyTokens contract and mint tokens to user
Approve Vault contract to transfer tokens from user
Call lockTokens function with amount = 0
Verify transaction reverts with 'Amount must be greater than 0'

test_cases.name: test_lock_tokens_negative_zero_duration
test_cases.description: User tries to lock tokens with zero duration
steps: Deploy MyTokens contract and mint tokens to user
Approve Vault contract to transfer tokens from user
Call lockTokens function with lockDuration = 0
Verify transaction reverts with 'Lock duration must be greater than 0'

test_cases.name: test_lock_tokens_negative_already_locked
test_cases.description: User tries to lock tokens when they already have active locked tokens
steps: Deploy MyTokens contract and mint tokens to user
Approve Vault contract to transfer tokens from user
Call lockTokens function with valid amount and lockDuration
Call lockTokens function again with valid amount and lockDuration
Verify transaction reverts with 'Already have active locked tokens'

test_cases.name: test_release_tokens_positive
test_cases.description: User releases locked tokens successfully after unlock time
steps: Deploy MyTokens contract and mint tokens to user
Approve Vault contract to transfer tokens from user
Call lockTokens function with valid amount and lockDuration
Wait for the lockDuration to pass
Call releaseTokens function
Verify TokensReleased event is emitted
Verify user's lock info in Vault is updated

test_cases.name: test_release_tokens_negative_before_unlock_time
test_cases.description: User tries to release tokens before unlock time
steps: Deploy MyTokens contract and mint tokens to user
Approve Vault contract to transfer tokens from user
Call lockTokens function with valid amount and lockDuration
Call releaseTokens function before lockDuration has passed
Verify transaction reverts with 'Tokens still locked'

test_cases.name: test_release_tokens_negative_no_locked_tokens
test_cases.description: User tries to release tokens when they have no locked tokens
steps: Deploy MyTokens contract and mint tokens to user
Call releaseTokens function without locking any tokens
Verify transaction reverts with 'No locked tokens found'

test_cases.name: test_release_tokens_negative_already_released
test_cases.description: User tries to release tokens that have already been released
steps: Deploy MyTokens contract and mint tokens to user
Approve Vault contract to transfer tokens from user
Call lockTokens function with valid amount and lockDuration
Wait for the lockDuration to pass
Call releaseTokens function
Call releaseTokens function again
Verify transaction reverts with 'Tokens already released'

test_cases.name: test_can_release_positive
test_cases.description: Check if user can release tokens after unlock time
steps: Deploy MyTokens contract and mint tokens to user
Approve Vault contract to transfer tokens from user
Call lockTokens function with valid amount and lockDuration
Wait for the lockDuration to pass
Call canRelease function and verify it returns true

test_cases.name: test_can_release_negative_before_unlock_time
test_cases.description: Check if user cannot release tokens before unlock time
steps: Deploy MyTokens contract and mint tokens to user
Approve Vault contract to transfer tokens from user
Call lockTokens function with valid amount and lockDuration
Call canRelease function before lockDuration has passed and verify it returns false

test_cases.name: test_get_lock_info_positive
test_cases.description: Get user's lock info and verify it
steps: Deploy MyTokens contract and mint tokens to user
Approve Vault contract to transfer tokens from user
Call lockTokens function with valid amount and lockDuration
Call getLockInfo function and verify the returned values match the expected lock info

test_cases.name: test_access_control_owner_only_functions
test_cases.description: Non-owner tries to call owner-only functions
steps: Deploy MyTokens contract
Call setWhiteList, setExcludedFromFees, mint, pause, unpause functions as non-owner
Verify all transactions revert with 'Ownable: caller is not the owner'
